issue_title: On-event-click does not work for all day events
issue_body_preview:
### Bug description:
When create all day event and specify on-event-click. Event is not fired for all day events.

### Link to minimally-working plunker that reproduces the issue
http://plnkr.co/edit/t8pOG2OB0SZawzMojtHQ?p=preview

### Versions
Angular:
1.6.0
Calendar library:
0.29.3
Brow
test_description_zh: 创建一个全天事件（all day event），并为日历组件配置 on-event-click 回调。在日历视图中点击该全天事件，观察点击回调是否被正确触发。
expected_result_zh: 点击全天事件时，on-event-click 回调应被正常触发，与非全天事件的点击行为一致。
